creator: lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
Only a website is correct, this:
- http://ooopackages.good-day.net/pub/OpenO                  ffice.org/sources/OOo_OOF680_m14_source.tar.bz2

=> OOo_OOF680_m14_source.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/o                  penoffice.org2.0.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://openoffice.lunarshells.com/sources/.
fetch: http://openoffice.lunarshells.com/sources/OOo_OOF680_m14_source.tar.bz2:                   Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch from http://ooopackages.good-day.net/pub/OpenOffice.org/s                  ources/.
fetch: OOo_OOF680_m14_source.tar.bz2: local modification time does not match rem                  ote
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/op                  enoffice.org2.0/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/openoffice.org2.0/OOo_O                  OF680_m14_source.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/openoffice.org2.0 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-2.

lippe@shire~>: make install clean
